# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"

plugins:
- name: cors
  enabled: true
  config:
    origins:
    - http://localhost:8080
    - https://mywebapp.com
    - https://adminapp.com
    methods:
    - GET
    - POST
    - PUT
    - DELETE
    - PATCH
    - OPTIONS
    headers:
    - Content-Type
    - Authorization
    - X-Requested-With
    - X-Custom-Global-Header
    credentials: true
    max_age: 86400
    exposed_headers:
    - X-Global-Exposed-Data
    - X-RateLimit-Limit
    - X-RateLimit-Remaining

- name: jwt
  enabled: true
  config:
    # Globally enabled JWT plugin. All requests are expected to have a valid JWT from a configured consumer.
    # If no 'anonymous' consumer is specified here, requests without a valid token will be rejected.
    cookie_names:
    - jwt_token_cookie
    key_claim_name: iss # Default: use 'iss' (issuer) claim to identify the consumer

- name: rate-limiting
  enabled: true
  config:
    minute: 500 # Global default: 500 requests per minute, limited by IP
    policy: local
    limit_by: ip

consumers:
- username: web_app_consumer
  custom_id: "web-app-client-id"
  jwt_auth:
  - key: "web-app-key-id" # Matches 'iss' or 'sub' claim from token, depending on key_claim_name
    secret: "super_secret_for_web_app_hmac_sign" # Or public key for RSA/ECDSA
    algorithm: HS256

- username: admin_app_consumer
  custom_id: "admin-app-client-id"
  jwt_auth:
  - key: "admin-app-key-id"
    secret: "another_super_secret_for_admin_app_hmac_sign"
    algorithm: HS256

- username: anonymous_user_consumer
  custom_id: "anonymous-user-id"

services:
- name: api-service-secure
  host: api.myinternaldomain.com
  port: 80
  protocol: http
  path: /secure-api
  plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
      - https://mywebapp.com
      - https://dev.mywebapp.com
      methods:
      - GET
      - POST
      - PUT
      headers:
      - Content-Type
      - Authorization
      - X-Service-Specific-Header
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      exposed_headers:
      - X-Service-Exposed-Info

  - name: jwt
    enabled: true
    config:
      # Service-level override: identify consumer using 'sub' claim
      key_claim_name: sub
      claims_to_verify:
      - aud # Ensure 'aud' (audience) claim is present
      - scope # Ensure 'scope' claim is present
      # No 'anonymous' here means only authenticated requests are allowed for this service

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      minute: 100 # Service-level override: 100 requests per minute, limited by consumer
      hour: 5000
      policy: local
      limit_by: consumer

routes:
- name: public-data-route
  paths:
  - /public/data
  service: api-service-secure
  methods:
  - GET
  plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
      - "*" # Allow all origins for this specific public route
      methods:
      - GET
      headers:
      - Accept
      max_age: 1800

  - name: jwt
    enabled: true
    config:
      # This route explicitly allows unauthenticated access, associating them with 'anonymous_user_consumer'
      anonymous: anonymous_user_consumer
      # No 'claims_to_verify' means just enabling JWT, if a token is present, validate it.
      # If not present, allow via anonymous consumer.

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      minute: 20 # Route-level override: 20 requests per minute, limited by IP (stricter for public)
      policy: local
      limit_by: ip

- name: admin-operations-route
  paths:
  - /admin/actions
  service: api-service-secure
  methods:
  - POST
  - PUT
  - DELETE
  plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
      - https://adminapp.com
      methods:
      - POST
      - PUT
      - DELETE
      headers:
      - Content-Type
      - Authorization
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600

  - name: jwt
    enabled: true
    config:
      # This route requires specific claims for admin operations
      claims_to_verify:
      - roles # Verify a custom 'roles' claim is present
      - permissions # Verify a custom 'permissions' claim is present
      # No 'anonymous' means strictly authenticated access required

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      minute: 5 # Route-level override: 5 requests per minute, limited by consumer (very strict for admin)
      policy: local
      limit_by: consumer
